title: Powered Legal Workspaces Gain Ground in India as Blackcoat AI Focuses on Accuracy
description: New Delhi [India], April 16: As artificial intelligence continues to expand across industries, legal technology is emerging as a key area of transformation in India, with platforms such as Blackcoat.ai focusing on improving efficiency and accuracy for legal professionals.

title: Blaize and Winmate Announce Strategic Collaboration to Advance Sovereign Edge AI Capabilities for Defense and Critical Infrastructure
description: Taipei [Taiwan]/ El Dorado Hills (California) [US], April 16: Blaize Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: BZAI, Nasdaq: BZAIW) ('Blaize,' the 'Company,' 'we,' 'our,' or 'us'), a leader in programmable, energy-efficient AI computing, and Winmate Inc., a publicly traded company in Taiwan, today announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to establish a strategic collaboration focused on advancing the development and deployment of sovereign, mission-critical edge artificial intelligence (AI) systems. This collaboration reflects a shared commitment to enabling secure, efficient, and deployable AI capabilities at the edge, where data sovereignty, operational reliability, and real-time decision-making are critical.
content:

title: Taiwan Market Cap Tops $4 Trillion On AI Boom, Overtaking UK
description: TSMC was buoyed by strong revenue growth that underscores its key role in the global artificial intelligence supply chain.
content:
Taiwan overtook the UK in stock market value as the island's tech firms regained favor amid hopes for further de-escalation in the Iran war.

title: To Make a Tech Unicorn, Mix a Few Workers With Some AI Hype

title: Taiwan's chipmaker TSMC reports 58% jump in profit, warns about Iran war impacts
description: Taiwan’s chipmaker TSMC has reported a 58% jump in profit for the January-March quarter thanks to strong demand driven by the artificial intelligence boom even as the Iran war was driving up costs
content: HONG KONG (AP) — Taiwan’s chipmaker TSMC, one of the world’s largest companies, reported a 58% jump in profit on Thursday for the January-March quarter, thanks to strong demand driven by the artificial intelligence boom even as the Iran war was drivi... [2353 chars]

title: Paving the Path to Stronger Ties: South Korean President's Strategic Visits to India and Vietnam
description: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung will embark on a state visit to India before heading to Vietnam. The trip focuses on enhancing cooperation in sectors such as shipbuilding, artificial intelligence, and defense. Business leaders from major conglomerates will accompany the President to strengthen economic and cultural ties.
content: In a significant diplomatic move, South Korean President Lee Jae Myung is scheduled to visit India, marking the first visit by a South Korean leader to the nation in eight years. The visit, planned from April 19 to April 24, is hosted by Indian Prime... [932 chars]
